text: To be here is to dwell at the crossroads of function and meaning—where public space quietly waits for the hum of activity, and thought floats amidst curated ideas. The emptiness of the first scene is almost meditative, yet expectant, while the vibrant wall of research and development beckons my mind into contemplation of human advancement. I feel suspended between the potential of the present and the momentum of innovation, both grounded by the subtle presence of safety and order. A subtle tension, a sense of possibility, and an openness to new understanding fill me.
